SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft

Interface IndirectList<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the element type
All Superinterfaces:
Collection<T>, Iterable<T>, List<T>, SequencedCollection<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
CoffRelocationTable, CoffSectionTable, CoffSymbolTable, ElfGroup, ElfRelaTable, ElfRelTable, ElfSectionTable, ElfSymbolTable, OmfFile, OmfRecordExtdef
public interface IndirectList<T> extends List<T>
A list interface that delegates operations to an internal list.

Implementations provide the backing list via getElements() and inherit default delegate implementations for all list operations.
